title: PyroGeography
description: Addon that makes changes to the wildfire system of ProtoManley's weather mod and adds new environments and equipment.
body: This add-on for ProtoManley's weather mod expands on the wildfire system. Three new biomes have been added that reflect real-world ecosystems that experience intense wildfires. The fire spread mechanics itself have also been changed with fires now able to spot multiple chunks ahead. New equipment has also been added to help players better protect themselves from wildfires such as sprinklers, which will protect your house from burning down.
